author: Glenn F
review: My mother and I rented a 2 bedroom 2 bathroom unit a couple of months ago. The initial relationship with the leasing staff was rocky, but I feel has improved since weve moved in. The unit is as advertised, and the appliances are very nice.

author: Eastside Inhabitant
review: Liars and cheats. Beautiful apartments, but quality of build is questionable at best. Look beneath the surface and shoddy construction run by shady people is what you get. Moved into a brand new unit and the list of damaged and broken items

author: Scott Welch
review: Exxel Pacific doing a great job building.
